title: Contact us — Tobacco Control Directorate — Health Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Tobacco Control Directorate
- Tobacco Control Directorate Postal Locator: 0302A Ottawa, Ontario Canada K1A 0K9
- E-mail: tcp.questions-plt@hc-sc.gc.ca

## Tobacco and Vaping Compliance and Enforcement Program
Regional Offices Telephone:
- West - British Columbia/Alberta/Saskatchewan/Manitoba/Yukon/Northwest Territories: 236-335-2186
- Ontario and Nunavut: 416-954-9825
- East - Quebec/Atlantic: 514-347-4194
Toll Free: 1-866-318-1116 (staffed Monday through Friday 8am to 4pm ET; voice mail available at all other times)
Teletypewriter: 1-800-465-7735 (Service Canada)
The personal information you provide to the Tobacco Control Directorate & Tobacco and Vaping Compliance and Enforcement Program will be used by the program under the authority of section 4 of the Department of Health Act , the Tobacco and Vaping Products Act , and handled according to the Privacy Act .

### Collecting your personal information
We collect your personal information to contact you to respond to your queries and comments. It may also be used for compliance and enforcement activities.

### Other reasons we may use or share your personal information
In limited and specific situations, your personal information may be disclosed without your consent in accordance with subsection 8(2) of the Privacy Act .

### Providing your personal information
You must provide the personal information requested on this form to allow the Program to respond to your question or concern, follow up on a complaint and complete an investigation. Sensitive personal information, such as your Social Insurance Number, is not required and should not be included in your message.
You have the right to access and request a correction and/or notation to your personal information. You also have a right to complain to the Privacy Commissioner of Canada if you feel your personal information has been handled improperly. For more information about these rights, or about how we handle your personal information, please contact Health Canada's Privacy Coordinator at 613-948-1219 or privacy-vie.privee@hc-sc.gc.ca .
For more information: The collection of your personal information is described in Info Source at infosource.gc.ca . Refer to HC PPU 410 – Outreach Activities Related to Tobacco and Vaping Products and HC PPU 433 - the Personal Information Bank for Tobacco and Vaping Products Compliance Monitoring and Enforcement.
